commit.message:
ci: add GitHub Actions workflow for Python and frontend tests (#15)

* ci: add GitHub Actions workflow for Python and frontend tests

Run pytest on Python 3.11/3.12/3.13 and the UI jest suite on Node 20.

* ci: use npm install instead of npm ci

The committed package-lock.json is out of sync with package.json, so
npm ci refuses to run. Fall back to npm install to regenerate lock
entries for transitive deps.

* Revert "ci: use npm install instead of npm ci"

This reverts commit dec62ac4dbac462f1d57b95efd2ca0a9c5fde15d.

* chore(ui): sync package-lock.json with package.json

Regenerate lockfile entries for missing transitive deps so npm ci
succeeds in CI.

verification.payload:
tree f5e011231aa9ce0f3d1aa2c2a400cd7892e1f1b4
parent fe2be4fd954ce8a6dd96ce9a8eb423fcf95b1937
author Shuxiang Cao <shuxiangc@nvidia.com> 1776666791 -0700
committer GitHub <noreply@github.com> 1776666791 -0700

ci: add GitHub Actions workflow for Python and frontend tests (#15)

* ci: add GitHub Actions workflow for Python and frontend tests

Run pytest on Python 3.11/3.12/3.13 and the UI jest suite on Node 20.

* ci: use npm install instead of npm ci

The committed package-lock.json is out of sync with package.json, so
npm ci refuses to run. Fall back to npm install to regenerate lock
entries for transitive deps.

* Revert "ci: use npm install instead of npm ci"

This reverts commit dec62ac4dbac462f1d57b95efd2ca0a9c5fde15d.

* chore(ui): sync package-lock.json with package.json

Regenerate lockfile entries for missing transitive deps so npm ci
succeeds in CI.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,101 @@
+# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Copyright (c) 2025-2026 NVIDIA CORPORATION & AFFILIATES. All rights reserved.
+# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
+#
+# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
+# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
+# You may obtain a copy of the License at
+#
+# http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
+#
+# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
+# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
+# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
+# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
+# limitations under the License.
+
+name: CI
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main, dev]
+  pull_request:
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+
+jobs:
+  test-python:
+    name: Python ${{ matrix.python-version }}
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        python-version: ["3.11", "3.12", "3.13"]
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
+
+      - name: Set up Python ${{ matrix.python-version }}
+        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
+        with:
+          python-version: ${{ matrix.python-version }}
+          cache: pip
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: |
+          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
+          pip install -e ".[test]"
+
+      - name: Run pytest
+        run: |
+          pytest tests/ \
+            --cov=tools --cov=vlm --cov=core \
+            --cov-report=term-missing \
+            --cov-report=xml
+
+      - name: Upload coverage report
+        if: matrix.python-version == '3.11'
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@ea165f8d65b6e75b540449e92b4886f43607fa02 # v4.6.2
+        with:
+          name: coverage-python
+          path: coverage.xml
+          retention-days: 30
+
+  test-frontend:
+    name: Frontend (Node 20)
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    defaults:
+      run:
+        working-directory: ui
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
+
+      - name: Set up Node.js
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v6
+        with:
+          node-version: "20"
+          cache: npm
+          cache-dependency-path: ui/package-lock.json
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: npm ci
+
+      - name: Lint (non-blocking)
+        continue-on-error: true
+        run: npm run lint
+
+      - name: Typecheck (non-blocking)
+        continue-on-error: true
+        run: npm run typecheck
+
+      - name: Run tests
+        run: npm run test:ci
+
+      - name: Upload coverage report
+        if: always()
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@ea165f8d65b6e75b540449e92b4886f43607fa02 # v4.6.2
+        with:
+          name: coverage-frontend
+          path: ui/coverage/
+          retention-days: 30
